## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] `npm run validate` passes
- [ ] Pattern tested against at least one real malicious sample
- [ ] No obvious false positives on popular legitimate packages/code
- [ ] Source is public and credible
- [ ] YAML syntax is valid (no trailing spaces, correct indentation)
